memoryArtifacts.description: John Paston I (1421-66) inherited the wealth and lands of his father William at the young age of 22, having benefited from an education and career in law, as his father had before him. However, John's …

zh.Bromholm, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可布洛霍爾姆
zh.Paston, North Norfolk, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可柏斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Paston I於1421年10月10日出生在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓時，他的父親William Paston44歲，母親Agnes Berry21歲。他於1440年與Margaret Mautby在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年5月22日在英國倫敦享年44歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可布洛霍爾姆。

zh-hans.Bromholm, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可布洛霍爾姆
zh-hans.Paston, North Norfolk, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可柏斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Paston I于1421年10月10日出生在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓时，他的父亲William Paston44岁，母亲Agnes Berry21岁。他于1440年与Margaret Mautby在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年5月22日在英国倫敦享年44岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可布洛霍爾姆。

nameMeanings.name: Paston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name, chiefly from Paston in Norfolk, probably derived from an Old English personal name Pæcci (genitive Pæcces) or Old English pæsc(e) (the source of northern English dialect pash ‘puddle’) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

English (West Midlands): sometimes a variant of Patstone, a habitational name chiefly from the lost Padston(e) in Bromsgrove (Worcestershire), and occasionally from Padson in Inwardleigh (Devon). The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Padda (genitive Paddes) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The etymology of the Devon placename is uncertain due to a lack of medieval forms, though an early spelling suggests the final element is Old English dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Paston I was born on 10 October 1421, in Paston, Norfolk, England, his father, William Paston, was 44 and his mother, Agnes Berry, was 21. He married Margaret Mautby in 1440, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 May 1466, in London, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Bromholm, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Paston I est né le 10 octobre 1421, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Paston, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes Berry, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mautby en 1440, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1466, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Bromholm, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Paston I am 10. Oktober 1421 in Paston, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Paston 44 und seine Mutter Agnes Berry 21. Er hat 1440 in England Margaret Mautby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1466 im Alter von 44 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Bromholm, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Paston I è nato il il 10 ottobre 1421 nel Paston, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, William Paston, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Berry, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Mautby nel 1440, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1466, nel London, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Bromholm, Norfolk, England.

ja.Roughain, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: John Paston Iが1421年10月10日にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンで生まれた時，父William Pastonは44歳，母Agnes Berryは21歳であった。1440年にイギリスでMargaret Mautbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年5月22日にイギリスロンドンで44歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブロムhオルムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Paston I(이)가 1421년 10월 10일 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Paston(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Berry(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1440년 영국에서 Margaret Mautby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 5월 22일 영국 런던에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 브롬홀름에 묻혔다.

mn.10 October 1421–after 21 May 1466: 1421 оны Аравдугаар сарын 10–1466 оны Тавдугаар сарын 22
mn.Paston, North Norfolk, Norfolk, England: Paston, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.10 October 1421–after 21 May 1466: 10 de outubro de 1421–22 de maio de 1466
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Paston I nasceu em 10 de outubro de 1421, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Paston, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Berry, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mautby em 1440, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1466, em London, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Bromholm, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Paston I родился 10 октября 1421 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Paston было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Berry, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mautby в 1440 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 мая 1466 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности бромхолм, норфолк, Англия.

es.10 October 1421–after 21 May 1466: 10 de octubre de 1421–22 de mayo de 1466
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Paston I nació el 10 de octubre de 1421, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Paston, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agnes Berry, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Mautby en 1440, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1466, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Bromholm, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
